title: data-kr error envelope
description: Shared error / partial-failure envelope emitted by pack.py and underlying clients. Either appears as a top-level error object (process exit 1) or embedded inline in nested fields (e.g. one regime-pack indicator fails while siblings succeed).

_partial.description: Always true when this envelope is in use. Drives pack.py exit-1 behavior at top level.

available.description: (regime-pack only) List of valid indicator groups when the user-supplied --indicators value is rejected.

stderr.description: Tail of underlying client stderr (max ~2000 chars) for subprocess failures.

stdout_tail.description: Tail of underlying client stdout when JSON parse failed.

returncode.description: Subprocess exit code from the underlying client when applicable.

_returncode.description: Subprocess exit code propagated when the client emitted JSON but exited non-zero.
